ops.title: Sync all docs/guides/hooks to the 8-kind entity model + ship v0.35.1
ops.description: Bring every enumeration surface up to date with the 8 entity kinds (note, doc, log, task, sprint, project, runbook, investigation) + papercut: README.md, AGENTS.md tree annotations, CLAUDE.md Durable Records, plugin/hooks/session.py announce (→7 record kinds), plugin/hooks/README.md tables, common.py RECORD_KINDS clarifying comment, internal/mcpserver/instructions.go (within 2KB budget), plugin.json (0.11.3→0.12.0) + marketplace.json descriptions, SKILL.md flow/cheat-sheet. Tiering policy: core records = task/note/doc/log/papercut/runbook/investigation; planning layer = sprint/project. Also sweep the 8 needs-review ODB docs and add an "enumeration surfaces checklist" doc. Plan: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-06/plans/we-have-a-lot-merry-candle.md

ops.text: every stale kind enumeration surface updated (session.py nudge names 7 record kinds; README/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md mention investigation)
go build/vet/test -race green and capt-hook pack tests green
8 needs-review ODB docs dispositioned (verify/edit/supersede) + enumeration-surfaces doc added
v0.35.1 tagged; release + bump-formula workflows green
